case_title: KWIKCASH, INC. VS. SONYA P BANKS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,496.63 FILED BY KWIKCASH, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, SONYA P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTED BY ANNA ARCHER, LEGAL EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL OFFICER. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO APR-11-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH REPRESENTED BY ANNA ARCHER PARALEGAL EXCUTIVE ASSISTANT. APPEARANCE BY SONYA BANKS. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEFENDANT IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT SONYA BANKS WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
